title: Admin deletes a quote
summary: From the /admin list, the admin clicks the row's Delete button (a client component with a confirm() dialog). The id is bound into a deleteQuote Server Action declared on the admin page itself. After delete, both / and /admin are revalidated and the list re-renders without the row.

steps.label: click Delete
steps.note: DeleteButton is a client component — confirm() runs in the browser first.

steps.label: deleteQuote.bind(null, quote.id)
steps.note: Per-row bound action — the id is fixed at render time, not posted by the client.

steps.label: Number.isInteger(id) guard
steps.note: Cheap sanity check on the bound id before touching the DB.

steps.label: revalidatePath('/admin'), revalidatePath('/')
steps.note: Both the admin list and the home category pills get refreshed — if it was the last quote in a category the pill disappears.

steps.label: re-render list
steps.note: Server Action returns; the page re-renders without the row.
